title: Internal error on empty generate-for loop with -O0
body:
This error happens on the `caliptra-rtl` project with `ASSERT's disabled. For example:

```
%Error: Internal Error: {}/caliptra-rtl/src/integration/rtl/caliptra_top.sv:1299:7: ../V3Descope.cpp:237: Node not under scope
note: In instance 'caliptra_top_tb.caliptra_top_dut'
 1297 | genvar sva_i; // kk: added context
 1297 | generate      // kk: added context
 1299 |   for(sva_i= 0; sva_i<5'd17; sva_i=sva_i+1)
      |       ^~~~~
 1301 |     `CALIPTRA_ASSERT_KNOW(... // kk: (ASSERT expand to nothing)
```


## Example test-case

Test case to reproduce this internal error:

```
// Execute: "verilator -cc -O0  err_not_under_scope.sv"
// %Error: Internal Error: ../V3Descope.cpp:237: Node not under scope
module err_not_under_scope();
genvar sva_i;
  for(sva_i= 0; sva_i<0; sva_i=sva_i+1) begin end
endmodule
```

Using the command line `verilator -cc -O0  err_not_under_scope.sv`,  verilator `v5.026-31-g11da07d3b` generate the following output :

```
%Error: Internal Error: err_not_under_scope.sv:5:7: ../V3Descope.cpp:237: Node not under scope
                                                     : ... note: In instance 'err_not_under_scope'
    5 |   for(sva_i= 0; sva_i<0; sva_i=sva_i+1) begin end
      |       ^~~~~
```


## verilator --version

Version | Node not under scope
--------|----------------------
v4.228  | No Error
v5.012  | No Error
v5.014  | No Error
v5.016  | No Error
v5.020  | Internal Error
v5.024  | Internal Error
v5.026  | Internal Error
v5.026-31-g11da07d3b  | Internal Error



## OS and distribution

```
$ uname -osr
Linux 6.8.11.fc40.x86_64 GNU/Linux

$ gcc --version
gcc (GCC) 14.1.1 20240522 (Red Hat 14.1.1-4)
```
